# Arcane Spells {#sec-chapter-arcane-spells}

::: {.callout-warning}
## Placeholder

Complete arcane spell catalog (~150 spells). Organized by chain: Elemental (Fire, Ice, Lightning, Acid), Force & Energy, Control & Enchantment, Illusion, Conjuration & Summoning, Transmutation, Divination. Each spell: Novice/Adept/Master tier, Discipline prerequisites, Weak/Standard/Strong effects, chain lineage. Quick-reference tables.
:::
